         },
         {
-          "line": 360,
+          "line": 362,
           "path": "README.md",
           "snippet": "FRANKENLIBC_MODE=hardened \\"
         },
         {
-          "line": 487,
+          "line": 489,
           "path": "README.md",
           "snippet": "The important runtime knob is `FRANKENLIBC_MODE`. The broader environment inventory is machine-generated in `tests/conformance/runtime_env_inventory.v1.json`."
         },
         {
-          "line": 493,
+          "line": 495,
           "path": "README.md",
           "snippet": "export FRANKENLIBC_MODE=hardened          # strict | hardened"
         },
         {
-          "line": 510,
+          "line": 512,
           "path": "README.md",
           "snippet": "| `FRANKENLIBC_MODE` | `strict` | Process-wide immutable mode selection |"
         },
         {
-          "line": 981,
+          "line": 983,
           "path": "README.md",
           "snippet": "| hardened investigation | run suspicious workloads with `FRANKENLIBC_MODE=hardened` and collect evidence |"
         },
         {
-          "line": 1054,
+          "line": 1056,
           "path": "README.md",
           "snippet": "FRANKENLIBC_MODE=hardened \\"
         },
         {
-          "line": 1565,
+          "line": 1568,
           "path": "README.md",
           "snippet": "The process-wide mode is resolved exactly once from `FRANKENLIBC_MODE`:"
         },
         {
-          "line": 1741,
+          "line": 1744,
           "path": "README.md",
           "snippet": "Interpose deployment uses `LD_PRELOAD=target/release/libfrankenlibc_abi.so <program>`. Hardened interpose deployment uses `FRANKENLIBC_MODE=hardened LD_PRELOAD=target/release/libfrankenlibc_abi.so <program>`."
         }
